nasb.text: He will also lift up a standard to the distant nation, And will whistle for it from the ends of the earth; And behold, it will come with speed swiftly.

esv.text: He will raise a signal for nations far away, and whistle for them from the ends of the earth; and behold, quickly, speedily they come!

cnv.text: 他必豎立旗幟，招一國的人從遠方而來， 發出哨聲把他們從地極召來； 看！他們必急速快奔而來。

ccb.text: 祂必竖起旗帜召集远方的国家， 吹哨叫来地极的人。 看啊，他们必飞速而来！

csbs.text: 他要向远方的国家竖起旗帜， 发出哨声召来地极的人； 看哪，他们必飞快迅速而来！
